# Sample Page

<!-- TODO: screenshot goes here -->

Intro text linking to [[Quick Start|Quick-Start]] and [[Home]].

Anchored wikilink: [[Quick Start#first-steps|Quick-Start]].

Bare relative links, the native GitHub-wiki spelling: [Currencies](Currencies),
[Quick Start](Quick-Start#first-steps) and [with extension](Home.md).

Left alone: [external](https://example.com), [absolute](/dashboard),
[anchor](#section) and [mail](mailto:hi@example.com).

![A picture](assets/pic.png)

![External](https://example.com/x.png)

Inline code must survive: `actions[key](ctx)` and `[x](y)`.

```js
const link = [label](Currencies)
```
